prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-HDMETRSB-2PC-LG-SLVRORNG Product Type: SLEEPING_BAG Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Emergency Sleeping Bag Heavy Duty Tear Resistant Mylar Foil Heat Retention Description: Torrential rain, hail, snowstorm or extreme wind, never be caught in the cold without a thermal emergency blanket sleeping bag. Also referred to as a bivy sack, the ASR Outdoor thermal emergency blanket sleeping bag was engineered to retain body heat and provide protection, warmth and dryness when you're up against the elements, making it an absolute must-have, essential item in your survival kit, emergency kit or bug out bag. Here are some important product specs to note on the mylar emergency blanket sleeping bag:

- Heavy-duty aluminized polyethylene Mylar material (tear/weather resistant)
- Bright orange exterior color increases visibility to emergency rescuers
- Reflective interior reflects and retains 95% of generated body heat
- Designed for one single adult (36 inches by 84 inches)
- Extra-thick 40um thickness for prolonged warmth
- Weighs just 5 ounces

The most exceptional and noteworthy quality of the ASR Outdoor reusable thermal Mylar sleeping bag is it's extra thickness. At 40um's, it's almost double the thickness of most competitors, allowing it to prolong warmth, dryness to help your body maintain a normal body temperature. In addition, the emergency blanket sleeping bag will reflect back and retain 95% of your body heat, helping to regulate the circulatory system and to assist in preventing the body from entering a state of shock or hypothermia when caught in extreme weather conditions.

The ASR Outdoor bivy sac will keep you warm because of it's material construction; Made from heavy-duty aluminized polyethylene (PE) Mylar, the emergency blanket sleeping bag is extremely durable and weather-resistant, tear and puncture resistant, waterproof and windproof to be exact Search Terms: military MRE survivalist edc carry bag safe travel storm weather emergency outdoor survival safety blanket fire resistant mylar foil blanket large size body cover bivvy sack camping hiking essential safe pack Features: - EXTREME ELEMENTS DEFENSE: Never be caught in the cold; the ASR Outdoor Reusable Thermal Mylar Emergency Blanket Sleeping Bag will protect you from harsh weather conditions like rain, snow, hail and wind; the emergency blanket sleeping bag is an essential item for your survival kit or bug out bag - 40UM THICKNESS AND PUNCTURE RESISTANT: The ASR Outdoor Reusable Thermal Mylar Emergency Blanket Sleeping Bag boasts a notable 40um thickness; made from heavy duty tear and puncture resistant aluminized polyethylene Mylar material making it extremely an extremely reliable, durable and long last survival or emergency product - RETAIN 95% BODY HEAT: The interior of the ASR Outdoor Reusable Thermal Mylar Emergency Blanket Sleeping Bag will reflect back and retain 95% of your body heat for prolonged warmth and dryness, helping to regulate the circulatory system and to assist in preventing the body from entering a state of shock or hypothermia - LIGHTWEIGHT AND COMPACT: Weighing just 5 ounces, the ASR Outdoor Reusable Thermal Mylar Emergency Blanket Sleeping Bag while designed to comfortably fit a single adult, easily rolls up to measure just six by six by three inches making it easy to store and travel with when not in use; reusable drawstring storage travel bag is included - SPECIFICATIONS: Size: 36 inches by 84 inches; Weight: 5oz; Color: Orange; Retains 95% body heat; Thickness: 40um; Reusable drawstring storage travel bag included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
